name: Travel Day Content
description: Documents the team's travel for away matches — airport, plane, bus, hotel arrival. Shows the logistics and camaraderie of matchday travel.
guidelines: Sequence: departure from training ground, boarding bus/plane, candid player moments during travel, arrival at destination, hotel check-in. 30-45 seconds. Use trending travel audio or a laid-back track. Location tags for departure and destination. Show player personalities — music choices, card games, sleeping. Light and fun tone. Post during the journey for real-time engagement.
